entry.title: New IDC GS00Q14OADS621 awarded to TORCH TECHNOLOGIES INC for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ONE ACQUISITION SOLUTION FOR INTEGRATED SERVICES (OASIS) PROFESSIONAL SERVICES MULTIPLE AGENCY CONTRACT, IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:extentCompeted.description: FULL AND OPEN COMPETITION AFTER EXCLUSION OF SOURCES
